title: Datadog Tracer Installation Flow
interaction_flow: CLI → main(): entry point via argv
main() → parse_validate_user_options(): parse & validate all CLI flags
parse_validate_user_options() → parse_cli_arguments($argv): tokenize long opts (--x), short opts (-x), commands, DD_ env vars
parse_cli_arguments() → main(): returns {cmd, opts} or false on parse error
parse_validate_user_options(): if --help/-h → print_help() + exit(0)
parse_validate_user_options(): normalizes OPT_INSTALL_DIR, OPT_PHP_BIN, OPT_FILE, OPT_EXTENSION_DIR, OPT_PHP_INI, OPT_ENABLE_APPSEC, OPT_ENABLE_PROFILING; returns {cmd, opts}
main(): if cmd==install (default) → install($options)
install() → get_architecture(): detect x86_64/aarch64
install() → check_library_prerequisite_or_exit('libcurl'): verify shared library present
install() → check_library_prerequisite_or_exit('libgcc_s'): verify shared library present
install() [if --enable-profiling on non-Alpine] → check_library_prerequisite_or_exit('libdl.so','libpthread','librt')
install() → require_binaries_or_exit($options): resolve PHP binary paths (supports 'all' to search standard paths)
install() [foreach binary] → check_php_ext_prerequisite_or_exit($fullPath, 'json'): ensure json extension loaded
install() [foreach binary] → ini_values($fullPath): run 'php -i', parse PHP Version, INI main, scan dir, extension_dir, thread-safety, PHP API, debug build
install(): compute extensionSuffix (-debug, -zts) and downloadVersions per binary
install(): build download URL: RELEASE_URL_PREFIX + 'dd-library-php-{version}-{platform}{tar_gz_suffix}.tar.gz'
install() → download($url, $tmpDirTarGz, $retry): attempt ext-curl → CLI curl → file_get_contents; returns true/false
download() → FileSystem: write .tar.gz to /tmp/dd-install/
install() → FileSystem: extract archive via 'tar -xf' (or 7z on Windows) to $tmpDir
install(): read VERSION file from extracted archive
install() → FileSystem: mkdir $installDir/dd-trace-sources; cp trace/src → installDir
install() [if appsec present in archive] → FileSystem: cp appsec/lib and appsec/etc to installDir
install() [foreach binary, foreach iniFilePath] → safe_copy_extension($extensionRealPath, $extensionDestination): atomic copy via tmp + rename for ddtrace.so
install() [if profiling available] → safe_copy_extension($profilingExtensionRealPath, $profilingExtensionDestination)
install() [if appsec available] → safe_copy_extension($appsecExtensionRealPath, $appsecExtensionDestination)
install() → find_main_ini_files($phpProperties): determine INI file path (scan dir → 98-ddtrace.ini, or main php.ini)
install() → get_ini_settings($installDirSrcDir, $appSecHelperPath, $appSecRulesPath): return list of extension= and datadog.* INI settings to write
install() → add_missing_ini_settings($iniFilePath, $settings, $replacements): apply regex replacements and append missing settings to INI file
add_missing_ini_settings() → modify_ini_file(): read INI, apply replacements, append new entries if not present, write back
install() → CLI: echo 'Installation to binary was successful' + 'SUCCESS'
key_decisions: If --uninstall flag set: main() calls uninstall() instead of install()
If cmd == 'config get|set|list': routes to cmd_config_get/set/list() bypassing install()
download() fallback chain: ext-curl → CLI curl → file_get_contents (with allow_url_fopen+openssl); exits with error if all fail
If architecture-specific archive 404s, retry with full (multi-arch) archive (tar_gz_suffix='')
safe_copy_extension() uses copy-to-tmp + rename (not direct copy) to avoid segfault on currently-loaded .so
Windows: blackholes existing DLL to TEMP dir before replacing (loaded DLL cannot be overwritten in-place)
If no INI scan dir: warns about fragile install; uses INI_MAIN file directly
Profiling extensions installed only if file exists in archive (conditional on PHP version support)
AppSec enabled/disabled in INI based on --enable-appsec flag and archive availability
On upgrade: regex replacements migrate old ddtrace.request_init_hook → datadog.trace.sources_path

key_functions.parse_cli_arguments($argv): Tokenizes argv: long opts (--key[=val]), short opts (-k [val] or -kval), bare words as command tokens, DD_* env vars mapped via map_env_to_ini(). Returns {cmd, opts} or false.
key_functions.parse_validate_user_options(): Calls parse_cli_arguments(), validates/normalizes all options into typed array. Handles help, file validation, install-dir default (DEFAULT_INSTALL_DIR=/opt/datadog), php-bin resolution. Returns {cmd, opts}.
key_functions.install($options): Core orchestrator: prereq checks → binary resolution → archive download+extract → file copy → INI update per binary.
key_functions.download($url, $destination, $retry): Multi-method HTTP download with progress reporting. Returns bool.
key_functions.safe_copy_extension($source, $destinatio: Atomic extension copy: copy to .tmp then rename. Windows: moves old DLL to TEMP first.
key_functions.ini_values($binary): Runs 'php -i' on target binary, parses PHP Version, INI main file, scan dir, extension_dir, thread-safety, PHP API version, debug build flag.
key_functions.get_ini_settings($sourcesDir, $appsecHel: Returns canonical list of INI entries: extension=ddtrace.so, extension=datadog-profiling.so (commented), extension=ddappsec.so, plus all datadog.* settings with defaults.
key_functions.add_missing_ini_settings($iniFilePath, $: Applies regex replacements to existing INI entries, then appends any missing entries from $settings.
key_functions.find_main_ini_files($phpProperties): Returns target INI file paths: prefers 98-ddtrace.ini in scan dir (handles Debian cli/fpm/apache2 split), falls back to INI_MAIN.
key_functions.require_binaries_or_exit($options): Resolves --php-bin values to full binary paths; if 'all', searches standard PATH locations. Exits if no binaries found.

important_notes: Single-file PHP installer (datadog-setup.php). Supports install, uninstall, config get/set/list commands. Cross-platform (Linux glibc/musl + Windows). Prevents APM auto-injection during install via DD_INSTRUMENT_SERVICE_WITH_APM=false. Archive extracted to temp dir; temp dir auto-cleaned on exit. Tests are in dockerfiles/verify_packages/installer.
